title: pristimera polyantha
intro: Pristimera polyantha, also known as the Malay apple or Polang, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pristimera polyantha include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various conditions. Pristimera polyantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
